Records.description: Two-loop planar double box contributing to Higgs+jet production through a massive quark loop. Three dimensionless parameters. 72 master integrals (reduced from 73 by a new Kira 2.0 relation). Elliptic subsector (pinched propagator 3) with 4 masters. Four new functions G_1,...,G_4 are needed: G_1,G_2 for the homogeneous elliptic system, G_3,G_4 for the inhomogeneous contributions from subtopologies. All G_i are integrals of varpi_0 times rational/algebraic functions over the mass variable.
